details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors without creating payment history.
details.localStagingCandidate: Can be locally staged after fixture-backed semantics by recording a local payment transaction and financial-status transition.

notes: Planned payment parity for `orderMarkAsPaid`. This root is not locally supported yet; it remains an explicit unsupported passthrough registry entry until payment payload and downstream order status semantics are captured.
